## What problem does this solve?

_Describe the pain point. Who experiences it? How often?_

## Proposed solution

_Describe what you'd like. Be as specific as you can — field names, document formats, workflow steps._

- [ ] Packing List

- [ ] Shipping Bill (ICEGATE)
- [ ] GST Tax Invoice
- [ ] Other: ___

_First-time exporters? Repeat shippers? CHAs? Freight forwarders?_

## Alternatives considered

_Any workarounds you're using today?_

## Additional context

_Screenshots, sample documents (redact sensitive data), reference formats._
